panels.description: Medium close-up shot: Frankenstein on the ship's deck, looking out at the frozen Arctic horizon with a melancholic and haunted expression, wind whipping his hair, heavy layers of winter clothing, icy mist in the background.

bubbles.text: And what, Margaret, will be the state of your mind? You will anxiously await my return, tortured by hope.

panels.description: Wide shot: The deck of the ship surrounded by massive, towering glaciers. Frankenstein is standing in the center, speaking with intense, charismatic gestures to a group of weary, frost-bitten sailors. The atmosphere is tense and claustrophobic.

bubbles.text: These mountains of ice are mole-hills that will vanish before the resolution of man!

panels.description: Medium shot: Frankenstein lying in a cramped cabin, pale and emaciated, eyes barely open, his frame fragile. The narrator sits nearby, looking at him with deep concern, dimly lit by a flickering lantern.

bubbles.text: Frankenstein has daily declined in health... a feverish fire still glimmers in his eyes.

panels.description: Medium close-up: A group of sailors pushes into the cabin, their faces hardened by fear and desperation. The leader steps forward, pointing a gloved hand towards the narrator.

bubbles.text: We demand a promise, Captain. If the ice breaks, you steer south. We will not perish for your voyage.

panels.description: Close-up: Frankenstein suddenly sitting upright, his eyes sparking with a terrifying, wild energy, cheeks flushed. He is shouting at the sailors with renewed, almost unnatural vitality, hands gripped tight on the bedframe.

bubbles.text: What do you mean? Are you, then, so easily turned from your design?
